title: About Us | Purbachal Apparel Limited
meta_desc: Learn about Purbachal Apparel Limited: our history, board of directors, mission, and commitment to quality and sustainability since 2012.
hero_desc: A leading woven garment manufacturer and 100% exporter from Bangladesh, committed to quality, compliance, and sustainable practices since 2012.

directors.name: Md. Masud Rana
directors.quote: We built Purbachal Apparel on the belief that ethical manufacturing and business excellence are not opposing forces — they are the same force.

directors.name: Md. Naim Hossain
directors.quote: Every garment we produce is a commitment — to our clients, to our workers, and to the future of sustainable fashion.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.text: To deliver world-class woven garments through innovative design, ethical manufacturing, and sustainable practices that create lasting value for our global retail partners.

mission.title: Our Vision
mission.text: To become Bangladesh's most trusted and sustainable garment manufacturer, recognized globally for quality, compliance, and positive social impact.

mission.title: Our Values
mission.text: Integrity, Quality, Sustainability, and Partnership — these four pillars guide every decision we make, from the factory floor to the boardroom.

culture.title: Worker Welfare
culture.text: Over 60% of our workforce are women. We provide fair wages, safe working conditions, health facilities, and continuous skill development programs.

culture.title: Environmental Commitment
culture.text: We are transitioning to renewable energy, targeting 300 KW of solar capacity, and continuously reducing our water and carbon footprint.

culture.title: Quality Assurance
culture.text: Our multi-stage quality control process, backed by international certifications, ensures every piece meets the highest standards before shipment.

culture.title: Community Impact
culture.text: We invest in the local community through education support, healthcare access, and employment opportunities for local residents.
